headline: The White House reversed its two-week restriction on Anthropic and lifted export curbs on the Fable and Mythos models.
body: The quarter's clearest reversal came in policy: the White House imposed a two-week restriction on Anthropic's models, then dropped it, with export curbs on the Fable and Mythos systems lifted and Fable access set to restore July 1. On the model side, Sonnet 5 shipped alongside a coming Fable 5, and early testing found Sonnet 5 underperforming Opus 4.8 and GLM-5.2 while costing more. Enterprise agentic deployments advanced as Google Cloud demonstrated FynanceAI orchestrating data across Oracle, Looker, and vector stores via the Agent Development Kit and Model Context Protocol. Underneath, code generation led the technique rotation while system design improved, and new entrants clustered around debugging, event logging, and pgvector.

cited_items.title: Sonnet 5 (Fully Tested): IT UNDERPERFORMS GLM-5.2 and COSTS MORE!?
